_description: Celgard 2400 — single-layer polypropylene separator commonly used in lithium-ion research cells.
name: Celgard 2400
comment: Dry-process membrane with slit-like pores. Shutdown temperature ~135 degC. Widely used in coin, cylindrical, and pouch research cells. Celgard 2325 (trilayer PP/PE/PP) is the preferred choice where shutdown functionality is required.
